prompt: We sent an invoice for 13833 EUR to Brightstone Ltd (org no. 883627393) when the exchange rate was 11.86 NOK/EUR. The customer has now paid, but the rate is 12.74 NOK/EUR. Register the payment and post the exchange rate difference (agio) to the correct account.
result: FX correction posted: Agiotap 12173.04 kr (13833 EUR × (12.74-11.86) NOK/EUR). Voucher 609222411.
